title: Pea Garden: a Plants vs Zombies mod
description: Adds Plants vs Zombies plants and items to your minecraft world
body: Pea Garden brings the iconic Plants from the PvZ franchise into your Minecraft world, with biome-based variants and new functionality and recipes to old vanilla items. Discover 8 Peashooter variants with unique properties to protect your base, collect sun shards to heal your allies, or build an extra tanky Nut Shield!
